title: Evangelion Obsession
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Obsession             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 10, 2008 1:16 am I'm not sure this is the right forum room, but I'll go on anyways. Are you obsessed with Evangelion and is Evangelion obsession good, or unhealthy. http://comipress.com/news/2007/09/02/2581 1000000 men out of the 127 million pop. of Japan. at least. 0.95 male(s)/female (2006 est.) ,If I did my math right, that's only 6680000 men (I'm pretty sure I did that wrong, that number seems too small), but that means about 1/7 men are obsessed with Rei just in Japan

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Jan 10, 2008 1:44 am 77% of all statistics are made up on the spot.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 10, 2008 1:52 am the article wrote: recently published a column from an otaku who claims (without source) that in Japan over 1 million men are obsessed with Neon Genesis Evangelion's Rei Ayanami.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 10, 2008 5:59 pm BobBQ wrote: 77% of all statistics are made up on the spot.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 11, 2008 8:02 pm Still...that was just an example that popped up, are people too obsessed with Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jan 24, 2008 11:38 am Uhh, yes. Same with most of the other animes and their fans. I'd bet Anno would bitchslap at least 1/4 of EVA fans when he'd meet them and hear all the junk they've bought. And afterwards make facepalm edit: EVA fans, not EVA (d'oh)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 24, 2008 5:53 pm You know, the article says they're obsessed with Rei Ayanami in particular, not NGE itself. They could just be thinking about her in a completely-detached-from- Evangelion sort of way.

Article: Evangelion Obsession
 24, 2008 5:53 pm You know, the article says they're obsessed with Rei Ayanami in particular, not NGE itself. They could just be thinking about her in a completely-detached-from- Evangelion sort of way.
